mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL values indicate accelerating inflation expectations, which forces equity valuations lower as discount rates rise, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over a 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are positive in >65% of months with rising CPIAUCSL.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE crosses above 4.5 percent, labor market slack triggers recession fears that compress corporate earnings forecasts, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or threshold crossing shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in RSAFS and HOUST signals robust consumer and housing demand that sustains corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a t-statistic above 2.0, or interaction term loses explanatory power in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp declines in INDPRO during a monetary tightening cycle reflect supply-side contraction that immediately pressures equity prices, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >55% of INDPRO decline months during tightening periods, or regime-conditional alpha is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A FEDFUNDS rate crossing above 3.0 percent triggers a liquidity contraction that reduces risk appetite and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE indicates structural labor market tightness that forces wage inflation, compressing profit margins and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction between PAYEMS growth and UNRATE decline shows no predictive power for 60-day returns, or profit margin data contradicts the wage-push inflation channel.

mechanism_narrative: Higher GDPC1 values reflect strong aggregate economic output that supports corporate earnings momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of months with above-trend GDPC1 growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO during a post-shock recovery phase signals expanding industrial capacity that improves supply chain efficiency and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of INDPRO expansion months during recovery regimes, or regime-conditional predictive accuracy fails to exceed baseline models.
